scripts.deploy: pnpm build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name slopcop
scripts.lsp:build:
esbuild lsp/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=lsp/dist/server.js --alias:compromise-verbs-plugin=./node_modules/compromise/src/3-three/verbs/plugin.js --alias:compromise-adjectives-plugin=./node_modules/compromise/src/3-three/adjectives/plugin.js "--banner:js=#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" && chmod +x lsp/dist/server.js
